primary_catalyst.description: Post-earnings selloff despite beat. Q4 FY26: $68.1B revenue (vs ~$57B est), $1.62 non-GAAP EPS, 75.2% non-GAAP gross margin, Data Center $62.3B (+75% YoY). Q1 FY27 guide: $78B +/-2% (well above consensus). BUT: company explicitly stated ZERO China data center compute revenue in Q1 guide â€” and an 'overarching AI bubble worry' persisted despite blowout numbers. Stock fell >5% on record beat-and-raise.

secondary_catalysts.description: CNBC: 'Nvidia's blowout earnings report disappoints Wall Street as stock sinks 5%'
Yahoo/Kiplinger: AI bubble concerns front of mind
Investing.com: 'Fed Speak Echoes Patience' added macro de-risking layer

force_attributions.rationale: AI bubble / buy-the-rumor-sell-the-news on hyperscaler capex â€” market priced in beat already
Explicit ZERO China DC compute revenue in Q1 guide confirms de facto export block persists (despite Jan H200 framework)
Customers 'starting to branch out to rivals like AMD' per earnings commentary

notes: CRITICAL earnings move. Volume z=+5.89 is extraordinary. Classic sell-the-news on priced-in perfection. Worst day for NVDA since spring 2025 per BNN Bloomberg.
